/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libnext_motor_interface__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so -o libnext_motor_interface__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so CMakeFiles/next_motor_interface__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/next_motor_interface/msg/detail/motor_feedback__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/next/next_HI/build/next_motor_interface:/opt/ros/humble/lib: libnext_motor_interface__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
